Title:
Verify search results with
Valid Employee First name
Preconditions:
- Browser is open
- User is logged in to OrangeHRM
- Employee List page is open 
(PIM → Employee List)
Test Steps:
1. Enter a valid emp 
first name (eg. addu)
2. Click on Search
Expected Result:
By searching the name the 
details would be displayed

Title:
Verify search results with
Valid Employee Last name
Preconditions:
- Browser is open
- User is logged in to OrangeHRM
- Employee List page is open 
(PIM → Employee List)
Test Steps:
1. Enter a valid emp 
last name (eg. test)
2. Click on Search
Expected Result:
Multiple employees with matching 
last name should be displayed
Actual Result:
Multiple users have 
same last name

Title:

Preconditions:
- Browser is open
- User is logged in to OrangeHRM
- Employee List page is open 
(PIM → Employee List)
Test Steps:
1. Enter the first 2 letters
of the name (eg. ma)
2. Click on Search
Expected Result:
All employees with 
names starting with "ma" 
should be displayed
Actual Result:
Multiple users have 
same first 2 letters

Title:
Search with only spaces 
in name field
Preconditions:
- Browser is open
- User is logged in to OrangeHRM
- Employee List page is open 
(PIM → Employee List)
Test Steps:
1. Enter " " (space) in the 
emp name field
2. Click on search
Expected Result:
Validation message should 
be displayed or all records 
should be shown
BUG:
Entering spaces in Employee Name 
field shows "Invalid Parameter" error 
instead of a user friendly message

Title:

- User is logged in to OrangeHRM
- Employee List page is open 
(PIM → Employee List)
Test Steps:

2. Click Search button
Expected Result:
Only Full-Time employees
 should be displayed

Title:
Combine name + status 
filter together
Preconditions:
- Browser is open
- User is logged in to OrangeHRM
- Employee List page is open 
(PIM → Employee List)
Test Steps:
1. enter a name in emp name field
 also select emp status field
2. Click on search
Expected Result:
Only employees matching both 
name and status should be displayed
Actual Result:
1 record found matching both 
name and employment status

Title: Click Reset button
Preconditions:
- Browser is open
- User is logged in to OrangeHRM
- Employee List page is open 
(PIM → Employee List)
Test Steps:
1. Enter any name in Employee Name field
2. Select any Employment Status
3. Click Reset button
Expected Result:
All filters should be cleared and 
Employee List page should reset 
to default state
Actual Result:
All filters cleared and page 
reset to default state

Title:
Click on an employee name
 in results
Preconditions:
- Browser is open
- User is logged in to OrangeHRM
- Employee List page is open 
(PIM → Employee List)
Test Steps:
1. Search for any employee
2. Click on the employee name 
   in the results table
Expected Result:
Employee profile page should 
open with full details
Actual Result:
Employee profile page opened 
successfully with full details

Title:
Search immediately after 
login with no filters
Preconditions:
- Browser is open
- User is logged in to OrangeHRM
- Employee List page is open 
(PIM → Employee List)
Test Steps:
1. Log out of OrangeHRM
2. Log back in with Admin/admin123
3. Go to PIM → Employee List
4. Click Search immediately without 
   entering anything
Expected Result:
All employee records should be
 displayed
